column14: Scaffolds a new DL project. Run init_project.py from shell for new projects.
Gathers domain knowledge via web and internal sources. Variation of 'Analyst'.
Performs exploratory data analysis and baseline establishes.
Designs the model architecture and experiment stack.
Breaks down architecture into INF-* and EXP-* tasks.
Builds data pipelines training loops and eval harness.
Executes training runs against the TECHSPEC.
Analyzes experiment results against TECHSPEC tiers.
Audits and amends all upstream docs.
Searches past experiments for validated parameters.
Adapts model for production and V&V.
